project: OpenCode Rust PoC - Wave 3 S3/MinIO Integration

memories.content: Wave 3 Storage Architecture: Trait-based abstraction layer with pluggable backends (Local/S3/Failover). Supports multipart uploads, automatic failover, and Prometheus metrics integration.

Storage Backends: LocalStorageBackend (src/storage/local_backend.rs) for dev, S3StorageBackend (src/storage/s3_backend.rs) for MinIO/AWS, FailoverStorageBackend (src/storage/failover.rs) for reliability. All implement StorageBackend trait.
Multipart Upload Settings: Chunk size 5MB, max parts 10,000, upload session timeout 24h. Implemented in src/storage/multipart.rs with init/chunk/complete/abort/progress/list_parts methods.

Prometheus Metrics: storage_upload_bytes_total, storage_download_bytes_total, storage_operations_total, storage_errors_total, storage_active_uploads, storage_operation_duration_seconds. Implemented in src/storage/metrics.rs.
MinIO Development Setup: docker-compose.minio.yml configured with API port 9000, Console port 9001, credentials minio/minioadmin, region us-east-1, HTTPS disabled for dev. Health check enabled.
Test Coverage: 60/60 tests passing across 5 days. Day 1 (8), Day 2 (12), Day 3 (10), Day 4 (8), Day 5 (8). Test-driven development approach ensures high code quality and reliability.

GitHub Repository: https://github.com/HHKK0127/Opencode_Rs on main branch. Latest commits: Wave 3 Day 3-5 implementation (fb4026b5), Wave 3 Day 1-2 preparation (86121b48), Wave 3 Day 1 foundation (b7c34b38). All changes pushed successfully.
memories.context: Production repository for Opencode Rust migration

memories.content: Project Status: Wave 2 Day 5 completed (2026-05-30) with all optimizations and documentation. Wave 3 Week 1 (Days 1-5) completed (2026-06-03) with full storage abstraction, multipart upload, failover, and monitoring. Next: Week 2-3 API Integration (Days 6-10).
Language Rules: User responses in Japanese, planning in Japanese, code/comments in English, variable names in English (kebab-case). README both languages. Enforced via language-Japanese skill.

Wave 3 Week 2-3 Plan: Day 6 API Integration (Upload/Download endpoints), Day 7 Production Hardening, Day 8 Integration Tests, Day 9-10 Deployment & Documentation. Estimated 15 additional tests, API endpoints for multipart operations.
memories.context: Next implementation phase after Week 1 completion

compression_log.notes: Compressed 5-day Wave 3 Week 1 implementation from detailed conversation to essential decisions and configurations. Preserved architecture decisions, backend implementations, test coverage metrics, and next phase planning.
